hero.subtitle: 25+ years of enterprise experience meets cutting-edge AI. Production-grade platforms delivered in months, not years.

services.title: What I
services.subtitle: Enterprise-grade solutions with startup velocity. Leverage 25+ years of experience combined with AI-powered development workflows.

aiStrategy.title: AI Strategy & Roadmapping
aiStrategy.description: Assess your AI readiness, identify high-impact opportunities, and create actionable roadmaps for AI transformation. Navigate the shift from traditional development to AI-first workflows.

aiDev.title: AI-Powered Development
aiDev.description: Build production-grade products using AI as the primary developer. Claude, Copilot, and custom workflows enable faster delivery, lower costs, and enterprise-quality architecture.

rnd.title: R&D & Prototyping
rnd.description: Rapid prototypes and proof of concepts to validate ideas before full investment. From blockchain to healthcare, test complex technical concepts with minimal risk.

about.title: Building the
about.p1: I'm Derek Kaneshiro—a software engineer with 25+ years of experience who's gone all-in on AI-powered development. Not as a buzzword, but as a fundamental shift in how great software gets built.
about.p2: My background spans orthopedic healthcare APIs serving 500K+ patients, veterinary platforms powering 750+ hospitals, and nationwide digital signage networks. I've led teams of 30 engineers and architected systems still running a decade later.
about.p3: Now I'm proving what's possible when deep experience meets AI-first development. In the last 6 months, I've shipped three production-grade platforms—each with mobile apps, web portals, APIs, payments, and analytics. That's not hype. That's the new reality.
about.p4: I help companies who want that same velocity without sacrificing quality.

portfolio.title: Recent
portfolio.subtitle: Three production-grade platforms built in 6 months using AI-powered development. Each with mobile apps, web portals, APIs, payments, and analytics.
portfolio.builtWith: All projects architected and built using Claude as the primary development partner.

blueskil.description: Connecting verified employers with apprentices in construction and skilled trades. Full hiring lifecycle: job posting, applications, interviews, Stripe payments, engagement ratings, and referral systems.

redy.tagline: Digital vault + EU DPP compliance platform
redy.description: Consumer app for managing receipts, warranties, and certificates. B2B platform for EU Digital Product Passport compliance ahead of the 2027 mandate. Document capture, OCR, sharing, and compliance reporting.

toknize.tagline: One API to tokenize anything, on any chain
toknize.description: Blockchain-agnostic tokenization platform. Create, manage, and transfer digital asset records with full provenance tracking across Sui, EVM, and Solana chains. Fractional ownership and multi-sig workflows.
